allow: Bash(wsl.exe -- bash -c "kubectl get nodes --no-headers --request-timeout=5s 2>/dev/null | grep -q Ready")
Bash(wsl.exe -- bash -c "kubectl config current-context; kubectl get nodes --no-headers")
Bash(wsl.exe -- bash -c "systemctl status minikube --no-pager 2>&1 | head -8; echo '---'; minikube status 2>&1 | head -6; echo '---docker---'; systemctl is-active docker 2>&1")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path data/eval/regression_fixtures.json\) { Copy-Item data/eval/regression_fixtures.json "$env:TEMP\\claude\\fixtures-backup.json"; Get-Content data/eval/regression_fixtures.json -TotalCount 5 } else { "sem fixtures ainda" })

PowerShell(git add main.go internal/handlers/lab.go internal/handlers/tutor.go internal/tutor/admin_quality.go internal/tutor/eval.go internal/tutor/feedback.go internal/tutor/lab_metrics.go internal/tutor/llm.go internal/tutor/prompt_quality.go internal/tutor/quality_metrics.go internal/tutor/tracker.go internal/tutor/exam_report.go internal/tutor/exam_report_test.go internal/tutor/feedback_loop_test.go internal/tutor/lab_env_failure_test.go web/templates/tutor.html web/templates/lab.html)
PowerShell($busy = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 8080 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "8080 ocupada: $busy")

PowerShell(git add deploy/azure/vm-backup-install.sh .claude/settings.json; $env:SKIP_TESTS='1'; git commit -m 'chore: instalador de backup da VM \(snapshot incremental + retencao\) e permissoes de sessao' 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; $env:SKIP_TESTS='')
